name: co.thinair/geo
description: Geocoding, truck routing, traffic, weather, and place search via MCP — 11 hosted tools.

apiKey.title: ThinAir Geo API Key
apiKey.description: Free tier: 15 requests/day, no card required. Get a key at https://geo.thinair.co/connect (anonymous instant key, or email-named key for rotation). Paste it here and the MCP client will send it as a Bearer header on every call.
